pattern_findings.name: domain_sensitivity_pressure
pattern_findings.interpretation: Domain sensitivity pushes adjusted risk, live delta and review pressure.

pattern_findings.name: partial_context_safe_escalation
pattern_findings.interpretation: Partial context splits into evidence-required for lighter domains and review for sensitive domains.

pattern_findings.name: noisy_input_allow_warning_gap
pattern_findings.interpretation: Noisy input needs ALLOW_WITH_WARNING to preserve useful output without pretending certainty.

pattern_findings.name: evidence_variance_gap
pattern_findings.interpretation: PROD-621 evidence coverage was too constant; this layer adds evidence probes.

pattern_findings.name: preflight_before_domain_activation
pattern_findings.interpretation: A domain should start as neutral seed and only become operational after preflight.
